docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT VICK, LOUIS ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VICK, LOUIS VICK, KIMBERLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 SOUTH VAN NESS AVE #382, S.F. $2,100.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,100.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-03-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 9AM. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. MUTUAL WAIVER OF ALL CLAIMS, INCL 1542CC. IF DEFTS VACATE ON OR BEFORE APR 3, 1998 9AM, DEFTS ENTITLED TO SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VICK, LOUIS VICK, KIMBERLY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, B.D. AS TO DEFENDANT VICK, LOUIS SUMMONS ISSUED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $17.86 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, B.D.

ROOM 220, JUDGE LITTLE, SSAWYER, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK 9:45 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. PLTF PRESENT W/ COUNSEL DEFTS PRESENT AND APPEARING IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFTS FOR A TOTAL OF $2,100 & POSS OF THE PREM. LOCATED AT 520 S. VAN NESS, #382, WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL 4/2/98, 9AM. IF DEFTS VACATE, TURNS IN THE KEYS, JUDGMENT IS SAATISFIED IN FULL AND DEFTS OWE NOTHING. NO OTHER TENANTS, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS/ATTYS FEES. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT VICK, LOUIS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT VICK, KIMBERLY
